unresolved: Overload ambiguity: the issue says 'the deserialize method signature' (singular). I assumed the primary abstract 2-arg deserialize(JsonParser, DeserializationContext). If instead/also the 3-arg deserialize(JsonParser, DeserializationContext, T intoValue) is changing, ~25 additional 3-arg override declarations and their call sites (e.g. SettableBeanProperty.deserializeAndSet/deserializeSetAndReturn 3-arg paths, MappingIterator.nextValue, DefaultDeserializationContext.readValue 3-arg branch) would also be in scope.

Call-site completeness: the deserialize(p,ctxt) method is the engine's core call; the dot-based search missed many bare self-delegating calls (return deserialize(p, ctxt)). I recovered them via supplementary grep, but I cannot guarantee every enclosing helper method was captured, especially across the large UntypedObjectDeserializer/NR/JsonNodeDeserializer/BeanDeserializerBase bodies.

Exact enclosing-method names uncertain for several SettableBeanProperty subclasses (ManagedReferenceProperty, ObjectIdValueProperty, MethodProperty, FieldProperty, SettableAnyProperty): the bare deserialize(p,ctxt) call lives in deserializeAndSet/deserializeSetAndReturn (and/or an inherited 2-arg deserialize helper); I listed the most likely method(s) but did not line-verify each.

Two DeserializationContext call sites reported by the search (readValue line ~992 / line ~1051 region) and StdKeyDeserializer.deserialize were not individually line-verified; the ~1051 'findRootValueDeserializer' label looked suspect and may be a mislabel.
Test anonymous/inner custom JsonDeserializer subclasses were enumerated by an agent sweep; additional anonymous overrides in large test files may exist beyond those listed.

Whether call sites must change at all depends on the nature of the signature change (e.g. adding a parameter vs. a covariant return type or added 'throws'); I assumed a parameter-level change requiring all callers to update.
